my_thoughts: 'I could defend myself now?'—tentative but considering it. Five turns: defended him, acknowledged hurt, got permission, now considering action. Teacher's 'Yes' is simple authorization. Five-turn progression: excuse blocking → impact validation → defense authorization. Student moved from protecting abuser to protecting self. Major shift. Clean arc.
accumulated_insight: T5 (Final): Student considers 'I could defend myself now?' Teacher confirms: 'Yes, you can defend yourself now.' Five-turn arc: defends abuser (T1-2) → admits hurt (T3) → questions past defense (T4) → considers future defense (T5). Teaching moved from blocking excuses to validating impact to authorizing self-defense. Student went from protecting abuser to considering protecting self.
visible_response:
You can torture yourself, or you could defend yourself against this torturous habit.
What shall we do?
